channel.title: Law and Development Review
channel.description: A RSS feed containing the latest articles published in Law and Development Review

item.title: Government Supervision of Oil Palm Plantations in Indonesia: Legal Issues and Proposed Remedies
item.description: Article by Jane Ezirigwe DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/ldr-2024-0014

item.title: How Democratic Police Reforms Fail: A Law and Development Perspective on Institutional Processes of Change and Resistance
item.description: Article by Jane Ezirigwe DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/ldr-2024-0017

item.title: Sustainable Development Under AfCFTA: Dimensions, Limitations and Prospects
item.description: Article by Jane Ezirigwe DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/ldr-2023-0127

item.title: Asset Recovery via Non-Conviction based Forfeiture: Rationale for Regulation and Recommendations for Implementation in Vietnam
item.description: Article by Jane Ezirigwe DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/ldr-2024-0058

item.title: Law and Macro Finance
item.description: Article by Jane Ezirigwe DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/ldr-2024-0091

item.title: Modernization of Nigeria’s Mining Industry: The Case for Participation and Sustainable Development of Local Communities
item.description: Article by Jane Ezirigwe DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/ldr-2024-0082

item.title: Human Capital and Growth in Arctic Regional Economies: Evidence, Policies and Institutional Perspectives
item.description: Article by Jane Ezirigwe DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/ldr-2024-0109

item.title: Advancing New Governance Models for Gender Data in Climate Resilience Funding
